title: Sulcorebutia totoralensis
taxonomy: Sulcorebutia totoralensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Cactaceae. It belongs to the genus Sulcorebutia, which is a group of small, globular cacti. The plant is native to Bolivia and is known for its unique, rounded shape and vibrant flowers. Within the Sulcorebutia genus, S. totoralensis is considered a distinct species due to its specific characteristics. This classification helps botanists and horticulturists identify and distinguish S. totoralensis from other similar species within the Sulcorebutia genus.
